lines.speaker: factoryWorker
lines.text:
Then sort out those boxes for me. The ones on the right of the belts. 
	Just place them on the correc belt and Ill give you 1$ for every correct box. Dont mess them up and dont throw anything else onto the belts.

lines.speaker: factoryWorker
lines.text: Well Ill have to go get them for you and I dont work overtime unless payed.

choices.text: Umm Ive accidentaly dropped some items in the machines..
No I dont think want to slave away here..

menu_entry.text:
|You can visit the post office any time to earn some money. Make sure you dont drop anything onto the conveyor belts or youll have to pay to get it back.
You can leave whenever but if you do, the job is reset.|

lines.speaker: factoryWorker
lines.text: Damn it kid! I hate going into the sorting room. Itll cost you...5$.

lines.speaker: factoryWorker
lines.text: And be more careful next time! DOPLNIT ODOVZDANIE PENAZI

lines.speaker: factoryWorker
lines.text: Well come back when you do. Im not going in there without getting something in return. I wont suffer because youre clumsy.

lines.speaker: factoryWorker
lines.text: Okay, the boxes are right next to the belts. On the right side.

menu_entry.text:
|You can visit the post office any time to earn some money. Make sure you dont drop anything onto the conveyor belts or youll have to pay to get it back.
You can leave whenever but if you do, the job is reset.|

lines.speaker: factoryWorker
lines.text: As you wish. If you change your mind you can cdome help out any time. We always like cheap-

menu_entry.text:
|You can visit the post office any time to earn some money. Make sure you dont drop anything onto the conveyor belts or youll have to pay to get it back.
You can leave whenever but if you do, the job is reset.|

lines.speaker: factoryWorker
lines.text: We have some boxes to sort out again.

choices.text: Umm Ive accidentaly dropped some items in the machines..
Ill get to it. Need the money.
No I dont think I want to slave away here..
Umm Ive accidentaly dropped some items in the machines..

menu_entry.text: Damn. I changed the thing in the state..or dream? I dont know what it was but It changed in REAL life! Wonder how much I could do. But I better be careful.

lines.speaker: factoryWorker
lines.text: Hold on..Are we actually paying you guys this much?

lines.speaker: factoryWorker
lines.text: Let me check in the system.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: the man looks at the computer and browses something for a minute

lines.speaker: factoryWorker
lines.text: Yeah somethings not correct here. Youre not supposed to get that much.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Well if it says that much on the computer then thats how much youre supposed to pay me no?

lines.speaker: factoryWorker
lines.text: You think we are made of money here?

lines.speaker: factoryWorker
lines.text: Look Ill give you one dollar for each box you did. Just like before we shut down last year.

menu_entry.text: I cant believe it. I changed the thing in the...dream? state? and it actually changed something in the real world..I just need to lower it I guess. I overdid it. But still holy smokes..

lines.speaker: factoryWorker
lines.text: Well then get to work or leave.

lines.speaker: factoryWorker
lines.text: Dont bother me I have important stuff to do!
